column1: #   body_file   — path to .md file with body (relative to templates/ or absolute)
#                 OR leave empty and put body text in the "body" column
#   provider    — gmail | proton  (overrides global setting if set)
#   delay       — seconds to wait between emails (default: 3)
#   - Wrap values containing commas in double quotes
#   - body_file takes priority over body column
#   - Use relative paths from the templates/ directory for body files and attachments
